programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team have their hands full when a raid reveals a crowbar-wielding suspect with a house full of drugs, a Taser and an offensive mouth

programme.title: Police Interceptors

A pizza delivery driver take fast food to the extreme, Doug gets to grips with a burglar and the hunt is on for Lincoln's answer to Harry Houdini

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall treats a ridgeback-boxer cross that has become aggressive towards other dogs after being attacked, and helps a cancer patient with a badly behaved golden retriever that is holding back her recovery. programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: The news that Pierce Greyson is returning to town ricochets around Ramsay Street. And he correctly determines Paul is having money troubles

programme.desc: Graeme Hall helps Paul and Yvonne, whose Border Collie will not let them leave the house without a marathon bout of barking, while every phone call also sets the dog off. programme.title: Happy Campers: The Caravan Park
programme.desc: in Looe, Cornwal, Tencreek hosts an end-of-season pirate party, but a blown-out barbecue threatens to bring a premature end to the celebrations. programme.title: Here Come the Gypsies!
programme.desc: Revealing the hidden world of Gypsy and Traveller communities, delving into their unique traditions and codes to understand how this community continues to thrive. In South Wales, Romany Gypsy horse dealer Jim 'Beb' Price faces his toughest day of the year as he puts on his first ever horse drive. Meanwhile in Surrey, Romany Gypsy cage fighter Tony 'The Rhino' Giles arranges a bare-knuckle fight to settle a dispute between two warring Gypsy families

programme.title: Extreme Fare Dodgers
programme.desc: With special access to Transport for London's revenue protection teams, this documentary tells the stories of frontline enforcement officers and undercover investigators fighting back against passengers dodging fares across the English capital ever day

programme.title: Adults Only
programme.desc: Sex doll manufacturers, husband and wife team, Jade and Elliot launch a new custom dildo product line, while Dominatrix mistress Sofia trains a new apprentice in spanking, and 19-year-old escort Ellie leaves her home town of Nottingham in search of richer pickings from clients with deeper pockets

programme.title: Millionaire Age Gap Love
programme.desc: Part one of two. The popularity of age-gap relationships among the super-rich, meeting six millionaire couples who are decades apart. Stories include that of 37-year-old Carolyn, who landed a job at 54-year-old multi-millionaire John's insurance company, little knowing that within a year she would be engaged to her boss and promoted to CEO of Mansfield Town football club. Meanwhile, DIY millionaire Craig had his life turned upside down when he won the UK's first Big Brother. But now, aged 48, nothing could have prepared him for his whirlwind romance with 33-year-old Laura

programme.title: Extraordinary People
programme.desc: In 2010, US marine sergeant John Peck lost his arms and legs while serving in Afghanistan. Dissatisfied with his prosthetics and determined to regain his independence, he put himself forward for ground-breaking surgery. This documentary follows John as he undergoes a bilateral arm transplant in an extraordinary 10-hour operation with 20 surgical staff in attendance

programme.title: Rich Holiday, Poor Holiday
programme.desc: Roger and Lisa are used to spending more than £8,000 holidaying abroad in luxury villas with their young three children. And 100 miles west in Southport live Sue, Genna and Ray. Nan and mum work so much that they rarely have time for holidays. While Lisa and Roger have a trip to windy Wales in a campervan, Sue, Genna and Ray are treated to an all-expenses paid trip to a Devon manor frequented by the super-rich

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: The news that Pierce Greyson is returning to town ricochets around Ramsay Street. And he correctly determines Paul is having money troubles

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Stephen supports Leah, and Alf brushes off concerns about his health, but Tane notices him struggling and offers to help at the Bait Shop

programme.desc: A 21-year-old living on her father's wealth moves in with a single mother who runs cookery classes for people with even less than her, and is moved to tears with the difference in their lifestyles. She also goes on a scary walk round Harlesden

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Expats Russell and Lindsay hope to attract punters to their convenience store with a selection of pastries, while retired nurse Susie and her husband Reg, who volunteer at a dog shelter, have their hands full with a littler of 10 puppies. Life coach Svetlana's online rants about the behaviour of expats on the Costa del Sol have gone viral. But as she prepares to record another monologue, she has a surprise up her sleeve

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Paul Walker and Victoria Maude leave their five-bedroom house in Arun Valley, West Sussex behind to trade places with Steve and Naz Edney, who live in a three-bedroom house in a Fareham, Hampshire, and are in the country's poorest 10 per cent. They swap homes, budgets and lives for seven days as they see what it is like at the other end of the economic spectrum

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: A decade of health problems has resulted in Elaine's two-bedroom flat in Rochester, Kent, being in dire need of a deep clean, but cat sick on the floor and an infestation of fleas make it one of the toughest jobs that Jon and Brennan have ever taken on

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A high-speed chase in Bradford's crowded streets ends very suddenly and the driver claims he just wants to get home to eat his takeaway while it is still hot. But is that the whole story? In Harrogate, a volatile drink-driver's rapid mood swings prove a test for the cops, while a large stash of cannabis is found at the scene of a major collision, which has left one person with life-threatening injuries. A couple suspected of dealing drugs are chased down and taken to the station, where they provide the traffic team with contrasting reactions to being held in custody. Jamie Theakston presents

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Thieves dragging a stolen generator on one wheel along town and country roads cause chaos, smashing the barriers on a closed level crossing and coming close to causing a train crash. A van with a surprising load is tracked using state-of-the-art technology in a game of cat and mouse, and a high-stakes hunt for a stolen van and mini-digger on the M1 nearly leads to carnage. Jamie Theakston presents

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Sgt Carlin arrests a gang of van thieves and uncovers a major criminal operation in the process, while a late-night compost thief is caught on his way out of the shower. Officers hunt for a trucker wielding a baseball bat who has apparently succumbed to road rage and vegetarian Craggy rides to the rescue of a lorry load of calves on the A46. Elsewhere, Brian cracks down on a barbaric blood sport, Jon faces an unexploded bomb, and two fuel thieves plough straight into the interceptors' precious BMW

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers from Lincolnshire's Roads Policing Unit are at the forefront of a raid against suspected drug traffickers, the hunt is on for a driver who has fled the scene of a horrific crash, and Rich Precious and Sean Baxter are left lagging far behind as they chase a speeding biker. Dan Brigginshaw is on duty at Spalding's annual flower show, and Sean Brennan deals with a young man who thinks he can throw his weight around after a boozy night out

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A van thief gives officers from Lincolnshire's Roads Policing Unit the runaround before taking a disastrous wrong turn. Dan joins a manhunt but finds dodgy diesel instead, while Jon wades into a late-night assault involving a pair of TV legends. Big Jim reports a boy racer to his mum and delivers a dressing down to a driver with a taste for rude gestures

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall treats a ridgeback-boxer cross that has become aggressive towards other dogs after being attacked, and helps a cancer patient with a badly behaved golden retriever that is holding back her recovery. His last port of call is to a miniature pincher who objects to any men coming near its owner

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Pierce is annoyed to learn Nicolette planted the necklace to ensure Chloe learned of his affair. Amy asks Toadie if she can move into Number 30

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ziggy's job search gets her down. Nikau is pressured to take appetite suppressants after a day-in-the-life photo shoot meant to increase his social media presence

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Artists David and Carol, who have been left with a shortfall in their UK pension after living abroad for years, try to sell some of their work at a market in Fuengirola. Campsite dweller and DJ Noel - who has a 10-year plan to buy a bar - gears up to spin tunes at his biggest gig of the year, the National San Juan festival. Cameras also follow former Playboy bunny Michelle and her husband Tony, who have taken advantage of the Costa's roasting heat and bought an awning company

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: The hospital struggles with a huge backlog of untreated patients from the night shift, as staff have a hard time ensuring that everyone is discharged or admitted within four hours of arrival. An 85-year-old motorist is treated for a severe head injury after skidding on ice, her car ending up on its roof. A woman who tripped while shopping fears that a broken ankle will jeopardise her plans to go on a cruise

programme.title: Skin A&E
programme.desc: The specialist clinic opens its doors to patients with acne, psoriasis and cysts.

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Thirty-eight-year-old Lesley is rushed in when her heart stops while she is driving to work, leaving Dr Morris battle to resuscitate her and investigate why a normally fit and well woman with no known medical problems would suffer such an attack. Abigail, aged 20, is treated for a painful neck injury caused by a riding fall, and 28-year-old Laura is brought in having a severe asthma attack. It is clear to Dr Fawcett she is deteriorating fast and that her heart could stop at any moment

programme.title: Basic Instinct (1992)
programme.desc: A hard-drinking San Francisco cop investigates the case of a man murdered with an ice-pick, but his normally well-honed intuition starts letting him down as he falls for the sultry and manipulative chief suspect, the victim's former girlfriend. Thriller from director Paul Verhoeven, starring Sharon Stone, Michael Douglas, George Dzundza and Jeanne Tripplehorn

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Officers stop a 16-year-old car thief in the early hours before he does any major damage, while a high-speed car and foot chase through the centre of Bradford ends in a gruesome smash. programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A wealthy mobster sends three young men on a quest to win his daughter's hand in marriage and earn his fortune. Later, Nick and Hank become involved in the case when bodies start to pile up. Meanwhile, Nick's home life is further disrupted by the arrival of a visitor. David Giuntoli and Russell Hornsby star

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A one-off edition of the documentary in which journalist Nick Wallis reveals how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions. Nick visits Stafford to meet seasoned CCTV operator and ex-police officer Barbara, who helps catch a drug user after spotting him on camera. Plus, control room operative Chris is on the lookout for regular shoplifters in Woking, while mild-mannered Jo foils a gang of thieves in Huntingdonshire

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica Fletcher goes back to college to receive an honorary degree, only to become embroiled in a murder investigation when the body of an infamous fellow writer is found. Starring Angela Lansbury and James Sutorius

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: One of Tony's old murder investigations is reopened and, in an attempt to find the perpetrator, he decides to switch roles with Gibbs, leading the team in an inquiry that links the case to an embezzlement scheme. American drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Sasha Alexander, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team heads into the Arizona desert to locate an artist who might be able to help solve the murder of fellow agent Jack Patterson - and discovers one of her paintings holds the key to the mystery. Meanwhile, DiNozzo learns he is in line for an inheritance

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of a religious website creator leads Bernard and Lupo to a network of corruption in a charitable foundation that provides the motive for the crime. The case becomes even more complicated when the suspect manages to avoid prosecution by being granted asylum, leaving McCoy fighting for his career

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Bernard and Lupo investigate the suspected hit-and-run death of the mistress of the CEO of a failed investment bank. The evidence leads the pair to a kidnapping and extortion plot that uncovers several potential suspects, including a disgruntled client

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the double murder of a wealthy man and his daughter, and the evidence leads them to suspect the wife and stepmother of the deceased are guilty

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the murders of two scientists found stabbed to death following a fire. The evidence points to a mentally disturbed woman, but Cutter and Rubirosa suspect she may have been manipulated by someone else

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates when a respected journalist is shot shortly after writing a hard-hitting article on the New York drugs scene. It soon emerges that the story was fabricated and had earned the reporter his fair share of enemies, while an unexpected lead causes the officers to reopen a 20-year-old case concerning the murder of a famous actress. Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the case of a college professor pushed under a subway train - and the subsequent investigation leads to a man who had kidnapped his children and changed his identity 15 years earlier. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Vance insists on taking charge of an investigation into the fatal shooting of a boxer - but antagonises Gibbs in the process, and finds his own past coming under scrutiny as the case unfolds. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Rocky Carroll

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The family of a child who finds a gun suspected of being a murder weapon at a naval base comes under suspicion. The team sets out to discover who last used the firearm, with likely candidates including a petty criminal, a drug user, a Navy commander and a boy. Crime drama, starring Pauley Perrette and Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: CIA agent Trent Kort returns to track down dangerous criminal Jonathan Siravo and Gibbs is forced to put his personal feelings aside to assist in the investigation. The duo manage to get hold of Siravo's accountant, who agrees to reveal all he knows in exchange for full immunity, but the trail leads to an old man in a coma in what seems to be a case of stolen identity

programme.title: Columbo: Murder in Malibu (1990)
programme.desc: A wealthy romantic novelist realises her lover is only marrying her for her money and calls off their wedding - only to be subsequently murdered. The fiance is quickly cleared of all suspicion, but Columbo remains sure of his guilt. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Andrew Stevens, Brenda Vaccaro and Laurie Walters

programme.title: Columbo: Dagger of the Mind (1972)
programme.desc: A London theatre producer discovers his actress wife is having an affair with her co-star in their latest production. To avoid exposure, the pair murder him and make it look as if his death was an accident. Meanwhile, Columbo is in the city to pick up some tips from Scotland Yard, and sets about uncovering the truth. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Honor Blackman, Richard Basehart and Wilfrid Hyde White

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank encounter the mythical Rat King after being called to a crime scene at the local dump. Meanwhile, a very badly wounded Trubel is taken to the hospital and Nick finally meets Meisner. Fantasy crime drama, starring David Giuntoli and Russell Hornsby

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate a wave of coordinated Wesen gang vandalism that results in the death of a local business owner and the kidnapping of Monroe and Rosalee's friend. Meanwhile, Trubel fills Nick and Adalind in on what she has been up to, and Renard dips his toes into politics as he endorses a local candidate. Fantasy crime drama, starring David Giuntoli

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and his comrades are still reeling from the scope of the ambush and the surprise return of Juliette, who has returned in the form of Eve, so that it is not really Juliette at all. In light of the heightened Wesen violence, Monroe and Rosalee seek answers from the Wesen Council, while Trubel has some important information for Nick. Fantasy crime drama, starring David Giuntoli, Russell Hornsby and Bitsie Tulloch

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A Tok'ra scientist provides the team with strange armbands created by the Atonieks - an extinct race which pre-dates the Goa'uld. The devices give SG-1 superhuman powers - but they soon discover they could be risking their lives in the process. Sci-fi adventure, with Richard Dean Anderson and Amanda Tapping

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: On Earth, McKay's sister Jeannie Miller is kidnapped by Delvin Medicinal Technologies president Henry Wallace. Convinced that only she and McKay are capable of using the nanotechnology necessary to save his daughter's life, Wallace lures McKay into a trap. Guest starring Kate Hewlett

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: First of a two-part story. Picard and Data are assigned to investigate why Spock has undertaken an unauthorised mission. Sci-fi adventure, guest starring Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Archer is haunted by visions of a woman whose race is being ruthlessly wiped out by a group of aliens hunting indigenous creatures. Sci-fi adventure, starring Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko's decision to let alleged alien gun-runners visit the station provokes Kira to mutiny - but as the rest of the crew begins to behave oddly, Odo wonders whether her aggression might be linked to a bizarre alien influence. Starring Avery Brooks, Nana Visitor and Rene Auberjonois

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: When the CIA informs McGarrett that his mother has gone rogue on her undercover mission and may have killed her partner, he goes alone to Mexico to bring her home and prove her innocence

programme.title: Abducted
programme.desc: Every 12 hours a child in the UK is taken by a parent or family member, with the guardian left behind often going through years of heartache and red tape just to see them again. This documentary follows three parents on emotional and dramatic journeys as they fight their ex-partners through the international courts in a bid to get their children back from foreign countries. With access to a team of child-recovery experts, the film reveals how some parents are taking desperate measures. Narrated by Paul McGann

programme.title: Britain's Most Evil Killers

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The crimes of American serial killer Dennis Rader, who murdered 10 people in Kansas area over 17 years and dubbed himself BTK - meaning 'Bind, Torture, Kill'

programme.desc: The presenter interviews some of the people involved in the hunt for Raymond Leslie Morris, who was suspected of murdering three girls in Staffordshire during the 1960s

programme.title: The Food Inspectors
programme.desc: Chris Hollins and Gaby Roslin find out exactly what's in chicken nuggets, comparing the shop-bought variety with home-made ones, and Matt Allwright reports on the single biggest problem facing the poultry industry - campylobacter, a bacteria and common cause of food poisoning that can be deadly. Chris gets a lesson in the best way to clean and cook herbs from Michelin-starred chef Atul Kochhar, and Coventry food safety officer Nicki inspects a takeaway, where she is horrified to come across the worst infestation of cockroaches she has ever seen

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Actor and comedian Adrian Edmondson returns to his birthplace of Yorkshire to document a summer in the life of the Dales, meeting the people who live there all year round. Sixteen-year-old Phillip Mellin talks about running his family's farm alongside his mother, following the death of his father last year, while vet Neil Roberts is called out to an emergency calving

programme.title: The Food Inspectors
programme.desc: Matt Allwright and Chris Hollins return to follow the work of more food inspectors as they protect the public from unhygienic restaurants and potentially harmful foodstuffs. A Chinese takeaway in Enfield, London, is shut down temporarily after mouse droppings and urine are discovered on the premises, while Chris finds out how much bacteria is lurking in the kitchen of a Lincolnshire fire station and also meets a Lancashire man who became seriously ill after eating undercooked pork. Matt investigates animal rustling and the effects these countryside crimes could have on the catering industry

programme.desc: Officers of MI5 and Special branch join forces to deal with a wave of sabotage attacks that have been sweeping the nation. Spy thriller, starring Liam Redmond and Andre Morell

programme.title: London Districts

programme.desc: Former student Alan Titchmarsh narrates this series following the work of staff at the botanic gardens. The team prepare for a royal visit, knowing everything has to be in perfect order. The Palm House is in need of an extensive makeover, with Emma Fox working hard to get it finished on time, as Stuart Henchi and the institute's 200 gardeners swarm over the rest of the grounds

programme.title: A Year at Kew
programme.desc: High winds force the gardens to shut down for the first time in 15 years, putting Tony Kirkham and the tree gardeners on red alert, while Dave Barnes struggles to move a collection of valuable palms into their new quarters. Narrated by Alan Titchmarsh

programme.title: The Face of Love (2013)
programme.desc: A widow begins a new relationship with a man who is the exact double of her husband, and shares many of his personality traits. Over time, she grows to love his own unique qualities, but fears he will leave her if he ever discovers the resemblance. Romantic drama, starring Annette Bening, Ed Harris and Robin Williams

programme.title: Saturday Church (2017)
programme.desc: Ulysses, a shy, bullied 14-year-old, lives with his mother, Amara, and younger brother. Given the recent passing of his father, Ulysses' Aunt Rose, agrees to help take care of him and his sibling while their mother is at work. He soon stumbles across a vibrant transgender community while trying to find his own identity. Writer/director Damon Cardasis's drama, starring Luka Kain, Regina Taylor and Margot Bingham

programme.title: Pirates of Somalia (2017)
programme.desc: In 2008, rookie journalist Jay Bahadur forms a plan to embed himself among the pirates of Somalia, and provides a rare profile of these men and the forces that drive them. Fact-based drama, starring Al Pacino and Evan Peters

programme.desc: Bradford City v Northampton Town. Action from the 2012/13 League Two play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where promotion to League One awaited the winners. The Bantams were making their second appearance of the season at Wembley having also reached the League Cup final following an outstanding giant-killing run, and they needed to come from behind to edge out Burton Albion to reach this stage. The Cobblers ended a run of recent poor form to win 1-0 in both legs of their semi-final against Cheltenham Town to move within one match of reaching the third tier of English football
